center.name: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary
center.summary: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄腰响蜜䴕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-rumped honeyguide (Indicator xanthonotus) is a sparrow-sized bird in the honeyguide family that is found in Asia, mainly in montane forests along the Himalayas
